gate_classification.interpretation: All required gates passed. Each of the nine arms also passed its data-wait gate with a predeclared 5-10% investigation note.

quality_findings.checkpoint_identity: Model, normalized resume, cursor, and trajectory semantics agree across arms; physical checkpoint archives are not claimed to be byte-identical because arm-local operational metadata may differ.
quality_findings.isolation: The matrix used network isolation and artifact policy none; local W&B record evidence does not imply cloud behavior.
quality_findings.performance: Per-arm data wait remained below 10%, all paired median overheads remained below 5%, and all paired values remained below 10%.
quality_findings.resources: Host, container, CUDA allocator, disk, temporal sampler, and zero sustained swap-I/O gates passed.
quality_findings.wandb_content: Watch-on arms each contained one decoded 315-series histogram record; watch-off and disabled arms contained none; no scalar failure was reported.

limitations: Network-isolated artifact-policy-none evidence makes no online auth, quota, retention, upload, or cloud claim.
DGX Spark unified-memory headroom is interpreted from host, container, and allocator evidence.
Decoded W&B binary records prove local history and watch content only.
Checkpoint equality is semantic and normalized; physical checkpoint archives are not required or claimed to be byte-identical.
